```curt
for i in range 99 1 {
  word = if i == 1 { "bottle" } else { "bottles" }
  next = i - 1
  next_word = if next == 1 { "bottle" } else { "bottles" }
  print "{i} {word} of beer on the wall"
  print "{i} {word} of beer"
  print "Take one down, pass it around"
  print "{next} {next_word} of beer on the wall"
  print ""
}

word = "bottle"
next_word = "bottles"
print "1 {word} of beer on the wall"
print "1 {word} of beer"
print "Take one down, pass it around"
print "0 {next_word} of beer on the wall"
```

```curt
fib n = if n <= 1 { n } else { fib (n - 1) + fib (n - 2) }
print (fib 30)
```

```curt
fact n = if n <= 1 { 1 } else { n * fact (n - 1) }
print (fact 10)
```

```curt
fact n = if n <= 1 { 1 } else { n * fact (n - 1) }
print (fact 10)
```

```
factorial n = if n <= 1 { 1 } else { n * (factorial (n - 1)) }
print (factorial 10)
```
